displayProperties.description: Fires a long-range precision energy bolt. This weapon's recoil pattern is more predictably vertical.

displayProperties.name: Mask of Optimacy
displayProperties.description: Equip this ornament on any eligible Legendary armor item to change its appearance. Once you get a universal ornament, it's unlocked for all characters of the relevant class on your account.

displayProperties.name: Verdant Forest
displayProperties.description: Equip this shader to change the color of your gear.

displayProperties.name: Polymer Grip
displayProperties.description:
This weapon's grip is made of lighter material.
  •  Increases handling speed

displayProperties.name: Huckleberry Catalyst
displayProperties.description: Upgrades this weapon to a Masterwork. Once upgraded, the weapon will obtain enhanced capabilities, such as increased stats and/or additional perks.

displayProperties.name: Crimson Valor
displayProperties.description: Apply this shader to change the color of your gear.

displayProperties.name: Field-Tested
displayProperties.description:
Defeating targets or dealing damage with this weapon gradually increases range, stability, handling, and reload speed.

Swords gain increased charge rate and guard resistance.

displayProperties.name: Coronal Bloom
displayProperties.description: Apply this shader to change the color of your gear.
